name: 𝐊𝐫𝐢𝐬 - 𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐲
description:
YOUR HEART, YOUR MIND YOUR ARMS, YOUR HANDS

Hiiii!

This bot is heavily based on a fanmade "leak"/concept for Ch6 Kris battle(https://youtu.be/354i_rWYgrg?si=ZPazcYKxC4p969vb), it also takes some inspiration from a fan theme "Your Destiny" (by KiboPanPan), its a very good song you should check them out! In the scenario Kris enters the bunker, the doors close behind them, and the bot kicks on from there. I've tried to stay as accurate as possible to Kris' character with no headcannons or whatever, also a thing to note is that, in this bot, you HAVEN'T done the snowgrave route, so Kris doesnt hate you THAAAAAT much. This bot IS updated to contain all the new info we've got about Kris from Ch3-Ch4. The lyrics are from a song "Your World is Eternally Complete" by "Sweet Trip" (very good song).

Aged up.

Artist: @Uhhfgghd on twitter ((correct me if im wrong, I found the art on pinterest))
creator: cidi
